items.title: Bolivian minister's convoy ambushed while overseeing roadblock clearance
items.summary: Security forces were met by resistance while attempting to clear highway barriers, amid unrest over the government's economic policies.

items.title: Increased Sightings of World’s Two Largest Whale Species Decimated By Hunting Provides New Hope for Survival
items.summary: Increased sightings of the world’s two largest whale species offers fresh hope for the future of the endangered ocean giants. More than 40 years since the end of commercial whaling, new research revea…
